name: N64 Controller (Nintendo Switch Online)
notes: 170-byte Joy-Con Bluetooth HID descriptor (firmware-family analog, not a direct 0x2019 capture). NSO retro controllers share Nintendo's Joy-Con/Pro Controller firmware framing. The generic gamepad report declares 16 buttons + 1 hat + 4 axes; the physical N64 NSO has ~14 buttons (A, B, C-Up/Down/Left/Right, L, R, Z, Start, D-pad-as-buttons-or-hat, Home, Capture) and one analog stick (maps to X/Y), so Rx/Ry are always zero. Replace with a direct 0x2019 capture when available.
